meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Despite Trump’s peace talk claims, US-Israeli attacks continue to hit Iran
items.summary: Huge explosions were heard in Tehran and other cities, as Iran denied it held talks with the US to end the war.

items.title: Top EU official calls for negotiations with Iran and an end to war
items.summary: European Commission President Ursula Von der Leyen has called for negotiations with Iran and an end to hostilities.

items.title: Eritrea to end 18-year AFCON isolation by playing Eswatini in qualifier
items.summary: Eritrea vs Eswatini on Wednesday will serve as the first AFCON qualifier for the east African nation since 2008.

items.title: Where do reported US-Iran ‘negotiations’ leave Israel?
items.summary: Israeli analysts describe confusion as US President Trump unexpectedly shifts from threatened strikes on Iran to talks.

items.title: Polls open in key Denmark elections clouded by Trump’s Greenland threat
items.summary: Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen is projected to win a third term after standing up to the US president over Greenland.

items.title: ICE agents deployed to US airports: Which airports are affected?
items.summary: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers were reportedly sent to 14 airports, including New York’s JFK.

items.title: Palestine weekly wrap: West Bank attacks surge, Israel restricts Gaza aid
items.summary: Settler attacks and land seizures marked a week that was supposed to be one of celebration for Palestinians.

items.title: Mbappe fit and ready to play every Real Madrid game before World Cup
items.summary: French striker says he has made '100 percent recovery' from his lingering knee injury and is fully available.

items.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 25 of attacks?
items.summary: Trump claims talks on with Iran, as he holds off on energy attacks, but Tehran denies any negotiations.

items.title: Tiger Woods eyes Masters return with competitive golf outing at TGL
items.summary: The oft-injured 15-time major winner is hoping to use the tournament as a test run before the Masters next month.

items.title: Zinedine Zidane to take over as France coach this summer: Report
items.summary: Zidane will succeed his former national side teammate Didier Deschamps as France head coach, according to the report.

items.title: Trump administration deploys ICE agents at airports across US
items.summary: The Trump administration has deployed ICE agents to airports across the United States.

items.title: Israel bombs petrol station in southern Lebanon
items.summary: An Israeli attack has hit a petrol station in southern Lebanon, near the Rashidieh Camp for Palestinian refugees.

items.title: US markets surge after Trump announces he’s postponing strikes on Iran
items.summary: Major US financial markets opened higher after US President Donald Trump announced he was postponing strikes on Iran.

items.title: Large pro-government rallies held in Tehran
items.summary: Videos show large demonstrations in Tehran, where crowds waved Iranian flags and chanted in support of the government.

items.title: ‘Israel has been given a licence to torture Palestinians’
items.summary: UN Special Rapporteur Francesca Albanese has said the world gave Israel a ‘licence to torture Palestinians’.

items.title: Texas oil refinery in flames after explosion
items.summary: Videos show flames and a plume of thick smoke following an explosion at a Valero oil refinery in Port Arthur, Texas.

items.title: Survivors pulled from wreckage of Colombian air force plane
items.summary: Dozens have been pulled alive from the wreckage of a Colombian air force plane.

items.title: Israeli settlers vandalise school, raise Israeli flag in occupied West Bank
items.summary: Israeli settlers have been filmed vandalising a boys’ school in Huwara.

items.title: Iran war live: Tehran says Trump’s peace talk claims are ‘fake news’
items.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard calls Trump a 'deceitful American president', accuses him of 'contradictory behaviour'.

items.title: Trump says Iran ‘wants peace’ after US military did ‘great job’
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says ‘there’s a very good chance of a deal’ to end the US-Israel war on Iran.

items.title: Macron says Lebanon’s fight is ‘just’ amid escalating attacks by Israel
items.summary: France’s president Emmanuel Macron said Lebanon’s fight against threats to its security is ‘just’.

items.title: UN expert says world has given Israel ‘licence to torture Palestinians’
items.summary: UN Special Rapporteur Francesca Albanese says torture 'has effectively become state policy' in Israel.

items.title: Have Israel, the US and Iran violated international law?
items.summary: Civilian targets have been struck by all three warring parties.

items.title: Smotrich urges Israel to annex southern Lebanon as assault intensifies
items.summary: Israel's far-right finance minister says Litani River must be 'the new Israeli border', as attacks on Lebanon ramp up.
